title: User Registration Success
description: Verify that a new user can register with a valid email and password and receive confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Enter a valid email address and password
Submit the registration form
Check that registration is successful and user is redirected or informed

title: User Registration with Invalid Email
description: Verify that registration fails with an invalid email format and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Enter an invalid email format and a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify error message indicating invalid email format is displayed

title: User Login Success
description: Check login is successful with correct credentials and user lands on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input registered email and correct password
Click login button
Confirm that user is redirected to the dashboard and token/session is created

title: User Login with Incorrect Password
description: Verify login fails when an incorrect password is used and an error message is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input registered email and incorrect password
Click login button
Verify that login fails and error feedback is shown

title: Dashboard Loads with Budget Summary and Recent Expenses
description: Validate that the dashboard fetches and displays accurate budget summary, recent expenses, and quick actions as per data.

steps.description: Login and land on the dashboard
Verify budget summary data is displayed correctly
Verify recent expenses are listed
Verify quick actions (e.g. add income, add expense) are present

title: Add One-Time Income Source
description: Verify that a user can add a one-time income source by entering all required details and it appears in the income list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Income Management page
Fill the income form with a one-time source: name, amount, date
Submit the form
Confirm the new income source is listed and data is correctly saved

title: Add Recurring Income Source
description: Verify the addition of a recurring income source and that it is correctly stored with the frequency property.

steps.description: Navigate to the Income Management page
Add new income source with recurring frequency
Submit the form
Ensure the source is saved with recurring flag and visible in the list

title: Delete Income Source
description: Verify the user can delete an existing income source and it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Income Management page
Select an existing income source
Delete the selected income source
Confirm the income source is removed from view and backend

title: Add Expense with Category Assignment
description: Verify that a user can add an expense with a valid category and it appears correctly grouped under that category.

steps.description: Navigate to Expense Management page
Fill expense form with name, amount, date, category, and frequency
Submit the form
Check that expense is listed in chosen category grouping

title: Filter Expenses by Category
description: Verify that filtering expenses by a selected category correctly filters the expense list.

steps.description: Navigate to Expense Management page
Apply filter selecting a specific category
Confirm that only expenses from the selected category are displayed

title: Delete Expense
description: Verify that a user can delete an expense and that the list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to Expense Management page
Select an expense and delete it
Ensure expense is removed from the list and backend

title: Create New Budget Category
description: Verify that a user can create a new budget category with name, budget amount, color, and exclusion flag.

steps.description: Navigate to Category Management page
Fill category form with name, budget, color, and exclude_from_limit flag
Submit the form
Verify the new category appears with correct details

title: Update Existing Category Budget and Color
description: Validate that updating a category's budget, color, or exclusion flag persists changes correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to Category Management page
Select an existing category for editing
Modify budget, color, or exclude_from_limit setting
Save the updated category
Confirm changes are reflected in the category list

title: Delete Budget Category
description: Verify that a category can be deleted safely and associated expenses handle the deletion gracefully.

steps.description: Navigate to Category Management page
Delete a selected category
Check category is removed and expenses previously in this category are reassigned or handled properly

title: Add New Debt
description: Verify that the user can add a new debt with total balance, interest rate, and minimum payment, and it appears in the debt list.

steps.description: Navigate to Debt Management page
Complete debt form with name, total balance, interest rate, and minimum payment
Submit the new debt
Confirm debt is listed with correct details

title: Record Payment Toward Debt
description: Validate recording a payment reduces debt balance and updates payment progress correctly.

steps.description: Select an existing debt from the debt list
Record a payment amount toward the debt
Submit the payment
Verify debt total balance is reduced and progress updates accordingly

title: Delete Debt Entry
description: Verify that a debt entry can be deleted and removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to Debt Management page
Select and delete an existing debt
Confirm debt is removed from the list and backend

title: Update User Profile Settings
description: Verify that user can update settings including currency preference, monthly income goals, and weekly limit enabling.

steps.description: Navigate to Profile & Settings page
Change currency preference
Modify monthly income goal and toggle weekly limit
Save updates
Confirm profile data is updated and persists after reload

title: Export Budget Data as CSV
description: Validate that the user can export their budget data and receive a properly formatted CSV file.

steps.description: Navigate to Profile & Settings page
Initiate export to CSV
Check the response is a CSV file containing budget data with correct formatting

title: Error Handling for Invalid Income Input
description: Ensure the application presents an error when adding income with missing or invalid fields such as negative amounts or missing name.

steps.description: Navigate to Income Management page
Attempt to add income with invalid data (e.g. negative amount, empty name)
Submit the form
Validate error messages are shown and income is not added

title: Error Handling for Invalid Expense Input
description: Verify that the system prevents adding expenses with invalid data such as future dates or missing category.

steps.description: Navigate to Expense Management page
Enter expense details with invalid or missing fields
Try to submit the form
Confirm that appropriate validation error messages are displayed

title: State Persistence and Routing Check
description: Validate that application state (such as selected category filters and login sessions) is maintained via Zustand and routing works correctly through React Router.

steps.description: Login and navigate through several views changing filters or settings
Refresh the page and verify state persists (e.g. filters remain applied)
Confirm user remains logged in and routing is consistent

title: Verify Category Exclusion from Budget Limits
description: Test that categories marked as exclude_from_limit do not affect the total budget limit calculations on dashboard and summaries.

steps.description: Create or edit a category and set exclude_from_limit to true
Add expenses to this category
Check dashboard and budget summaries
Verify expenses in excluded categories do not count toward spending limits

title: Dashboard Responsive Layout Validation
description: Ensure that the Dashboard page layout and components render correctly on various screen sizes following Tailwind CSS mobile-first guidelines.

steps.description: Open Dashboard on mobile viewport
Check that all components are visible, readable, and usable
Resize viewport to desktop resolution
Verify layout adjusts appropriately and remains functional
